docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $550.17 FILED BY FONG STEWART AS TO DEFENDANT HANSEN MICHAEL   SERVICE MANAGER ROYAL MOTORS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-28-1990 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FONG STEWART RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HANSEN MICHAEL   SERVICE MANAGER ROYAL MOTORS $550.17 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $558.17 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HANSEN MICHAEL   SERVICE MANAGER
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT HANSEN MICHAEL   SERVICE MANAGER ROYAL MOTORS HEARING SET FOR FEB-04-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF FEB-04-1991, GRANTED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FONG STEWART IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HANSEN MICHAEL   SERVICE MANAGER ROYAL MOTORS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ROYAL MOTORS
